project.name: Spark Shelf
project.goal: Build a tiny local-first inspiration inbox that helps a creator capture raw ideas, tag them, and shape selected notes into short outlines.
boundaries: v0.1 should be a static local web app
agents must keep project context files updated

working_rules: Read project-context/README.md and the context files it lists before editing.
Use the Source Map section in PROJECT_CONTEXT.md before treating project claims as facts.
Record new durable decisions in DECISIONS.md.
Record missing context in the Open Questions section of PROJECT_CONTEXT.md instead of guessing.
handoff_rules: Summarize current goal, boundaries, decisions, risks, and next actions before proposing changes.
Do not add backend, login, external APIs, or analytics without explicit approval.

timeline.event: Project idea defined as a local-first inspiration inbox.
First demo scope constrained to a static local web app.

decisions.decision: Build v0.1 as a static local web app with no backend.
decisions.reason: Keeps the first demo small and easy for coding agents to modify.

decisions.decision: Use local browser storage only for demo data.
decisions.reason: Supports local-first behavior without account systems or external services.

decisions.decision: Keep AI outline generation as a placeholder in v0.1.
decisions.reason: Avoids drifting into a full AI writing app before the capture workflow is validated.

open_questions.question: Should the first demo be one HTML file or a small static app with separate assets?
What should happen when local browser storage is cleared?

risks.risk: Too many fields may make idea capture slow.
risks.mitigation: Keep v0.1 fields limited to title, raw note, tags, target format, status, and last touched date.

risks.risk: AI outline generation may invent details not present in the raw note.
risks.mitigation: Mark outline output as a placeholder and require it to stay grounded in the selected idea.

risks.risk: Local storage data can be lost if browser data is cleared.
risks.mitigation: Document this limitation in v0.1 and defer export/import decisions.

todos.task: Define the v0.1 idea data model.
Create a small UI wireframe with idea list, tag filter, selected idea detail, and outline placeholder.
Build a static demo and test it with 10 synthetic ideas.

source_map.note: Defines project idea, user problem, v0.1 features, and scope boundary.
Defines static local app decision, preferred stack, first demo UI scope, and AI writing app concern.
Defines potential data fields, status values, risks, and next actions.

limitations: This example does not prove real user demand.
The app has not been implemented.
The data model needs validation with real users before being treated as stable.
